data.title: Helios & Partners Makes Strategic Investment in WhatIsMyAEO.com to Pioneer AI-Driven Brand Visibility Diagnostics
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Los Angeles, a notable company, Helios & Partners known for their expertise in Consumer Ecosystem Investing™, revealed their strategic decision to invest in WhatIsMyAEO.com. This website offers AI-powered diagnostics for B2B brands at no cost, aiming to aid in enhancing their visibility and performance.

data.title: House Doctors Recognized on Entrepreneur's Fastest-Growing Franchises List
data.description: Premium Service Brands' House Doctors, a renowned home improvement and handyman services brand under the Premium Service Brands (PSB) umbrella, has been recognized for its extensive expansion and high demand from franchisees. The brand, headquartered in Charlottesville, Virginia, received this honor on March 25, 2026.

data.description: Valmet Oyj issued a stock exchange release on March 25, 2026, at 16:50 p.m. EET in ESPOO, Finland. The Annual General Meeting of Valmet Oyj took place in Helsinki on March 25, 2026. During the meeting, the Financial report was approved.

data.title: Knox Systems Wins Prestigious SC Excellence Award at Annual RSAC Conference for Best Compliance Solution
data.description: Knox Systems, a prominent federal AI-managed company, has been honored for its effectiveness in assisting customers in providing SaaS solutions to government customers in a secure and compliant setting.  The award acknowledges Knox's achievement in reducing project estimates to below 90 days, resulting in a substantial 90% decrease in time required. The recognition was received in New York and Washington on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces MeadowRock Luxury Home Community Coming Soon to Parker, Colorado
data.description: In Parker, Colorado, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), a prominent luxury home builder, unveiled plans for the upcoming MeadowRock community in unincorporated Douglas County. The new development will offer spacious one- and two-story floor plans on large home sites. Construction has commenced, and MeadowRock is expected to be available for purchase in spring 2026.

data.title: The Poetry Foundation Marks National Poetry Month with Free Programs, New Video Series, and Special Offers
data.description: In anticipation of National Poetry Month in April, the Poetry Foundation, located in Chicago, is gearing up to honor poets and promote appreciation for poetry. The foundation's focus on elevating poetry and poets remains steadfast throughout the year. The Poetry Foundation is introducing innovative methods to interact with and enjoy poetry during this time.

data.title: TCL Showcases AI‑Powered Air Conditioning Solutions at MCE 2026 in Milan
data.description: In Milan on March 25, 2026, TCL is showcasing its newest residential and light commercial air conditioning advancements at MCE – Mostra Convegno Expocomfort 2026 from March 24 to March 27 at Fiera Milano Rho. Attendees have the opportunity to discover TCL's innovative smart climate solutions in Hall 7 at Booth...

data.title: CompWest names Petra Risk Solutions its Agency of the Year
data.description: In Lansing, Michigan on March 25, 2026, Petra Risk Solutions was honored by CompWest Insurance Company as the Agency of the Year for their exceptional performance in 2025. This recognition stems from Petra's remarkable achievements in premium growth, new business acquisition, and client retention among other aspects relevant to the industry.シPetra Risk Solutions' outstanding performance throughout 2025 has solidified its position as a top performer in the insurance industry, highlighting its commitment to excellence and client satisfaction. This recognition serves as a testament to their dedication and expertise within the field.

data.title: Global Battery Materials Ships First Graphite Samples to U.S. Customer, Opens New Graphite Lab in Quebec
data.description: In Toronto on March 25, 2026, Global Battery Materials Corp. (GBM) revealed the launch of the GBM Graphite Lab in Quebec. The lab will focus on producing natural graphite products and advanced anode materials. GBM, a critical minerals and technology company, aims to strengthen its vertical integration with this initiative. The move signifies GBM’s commitment to innovation and research in the battery materials industry.

data.title: SOUTHERN GLAZER'S WINE & SPIRITS WORKERS IN FLORIDA JOIN TEAMSTERS
data.description: Over 25 employees at Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits in Lakeland, Florida, recently voted to be represented by Teamsters Local 79. The workers, involved in roles such as sanitation, inventory control, salvage, and day operations, made the decision by an overwhelming majority. This development was confirmed in Tampa, Florida, on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Tellihealth Names Kim Johnson, DNP, Vice President of Customer Success
data.description: In Houston on March 25, 2026, Tellihealth, a renowned provider of remote patient monitoring (RPM) and chronic care management (CCM) services, revealed the appointment of Kim Johnson, DNP, as their new Vice President of Customer Success. This strategic move comes as the company is scaling their operations and services.

data.title: Lyric Named to Fast Company's List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: Lyric, a prominent provider of AI-driven payment accuracy solutions for health plans, has been recognized as one of Fast Company's World's Most Innovative Companies for 2026. The accolade solidifies Lyric's standing as a leader in the industry.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Sift/
data.description: Sift, a company specializing in AI infrastructure for vital machines, recently announced a successful fundraising of $42 million in their Series B round on 25-Mar-2026. The news release originally published over PR Newswire contained some inaccuracies which have now been corrected by the company. This funding marks a significant milestone for Sift as they continue to develop cutting-edge AI technology for critical machinery. Further details regarding this announcement can be found at the conclusion of the revised release.
